scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/index.ts src/reset-docker-admin-panel.ts --bundle --splitting --minify --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outdir=dist --entry-names=[name] --chunk-names=chunks/[name]-[hash]
